use_cases: Displaying status indicators and labels in application interfaces
Showing category tags or topic labels in content management systems
Indicating notification counts or alerts in dashboard layouts
Marking user roles or account types in settings pages
ai_summary: A reusable Badge component with variant support for different visual states (default, secondary, destructive, outline). Built with class-variance-authority for flexible theming and includes hover color transitions and focus ring accessibility features. A foundational atomic UI element commonly used for status indicators, tags, and labels across various interface contexts.
